fileContents..snapback/checkpoints/cp_mhbri7ja_xkh4m/:
{
	"name": "snapback-site",
	"dependencies": {
		"@node-rs/argon2": "catalog:",
		"@open-rpc/server-js": "^1.10.0",
		"@vscode/codicons": "^0.0.41",
		"dexie": "catalog:",
		"dotenv": "catalog:",
		"framer-motion": "catalog:",
		"import-in-the-middle": "^1.15.0",
		"require-in-the-middle": "^8.0.1"
	},
	"devDependencies": {
		"@biomejs/biome": "catalog:",
		"@changesets/cli": "^2.29.7",
		"@commitlint/cli": "^19.8.1",
		"@commitlint/config-conventional": "^19.8.1",
		"@evilmartians/lefthook": "^2.0.1",
		"@faker-js/faker": "^10.1.0",
		"@snapback/tsconfig": "workspace:*",
		"@testing-library/react": "catalog:",
		"@testing-library/user-event": "catalog:",
		"@types/glob": "catalog:",
		"@types/node": "catalog:",
		"@types/pg": "^8.15.5",
		"@vitejs/plugin-react": "catalog:",
		"@vitest/coverage-v8": "catalog:",
		"@vitest/ui": "catalog:",
		"dotenv-cli": "catalog:",
		"happy-dom": "catalog:",
		"jsdom": "catalog:",
		"lefthook": "catalog:",
		"lint-staged": "catalog:",
		"minimatch": "catalog:",
		"syncpack": "catalog:",
		"tsup": "^8.5.0",
		"tsx": "catalog:",
		"turbo": "catalog:",
		"typescript": "catalog:",
		"vitest": "catalog:"
	},
	"engines": {
		"node": ">=20"
	},
	"packageManager": "pnpm@10.14.0",
	"pnpm": {
		"overrides": {
			"@types/react": "19.1.13",
			"@types/react-dom": "19.1.9",
			"require-in-the-middle": "^8.0.0",
			"@node-rs/argon2": "2.0.0",
			"@types/glob": "7.1.1",
			"@types/mdx": "2.0.13",
			"@types/minimatch": "5.1.2"
		}
	},
	"private": true,
	"scripts": {
		"build": "dotenv -c -- turbo build",
		"build:ci": "pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build",
		"changeset": "changeset",
		"check": "biome check",
		"check:package-versions": "node tooling/scripts/check-package-versions.js",
		"ci": "biome ci . && turbo type-check && turbo test",
		"clean": "turbo clean",
		"clean-build": "node scripts/clean-build.js",
		"clean:all": "pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run clean:tsbuildinfo && turbo clean",
		"clean:dist": "find packages apps -name 'dist' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true",
		"clean:tsbuildinfo": "find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true",
		"dev": "dotenv -c -- turbo dev --filter=@snapback/web",
		"force-rebuild": "node scripts/force-rebuild.js",
		"format": "biome format . --write",
		"format:check": "biome format . --check",
		"lint": "biome lint . ",
		"postinstall": "lefthook install",
		"prepare": "lefthook install",
		"rebuild": "pnpm run clean:all && pnpm run build",
		"release": "changeset publish",
		"release-snapshot": "changeset publish --tag beta",
		"seed:dev": "pnpm --filter @snapback/database run seed:dev",
		"snapshot": "changeset version --snapshot beta",
		"start": "dotenv -c -- turbo start",
		"syncpack:fix": "syncpack fix-mismatches",
		"syncpack:format": "syncpack format",
		"syncpack:lint": "syncpack lint",
		"syncpack:list": "syncpack list --sort count",
		"test": "vitest",
		"test:auth": "npx ts-node scripts/test-auth.ts",
		"test:coverage": "vitest --coverage",
		"test:ui": "vitest --ui",
		"typecheck": "turbo type-check",
		"validate-build": "bash scripts/validate-build.sh",
		"validate-env": "npx tsx scripts/validate-env.ts",
		"verify-build": "node scripts/verify-build.js",
		"version-packages": "changeset version"
	}
}
fileContents.apps/cli/package.json:
{
  "name": "@snapback/cli",
  "version": "0.1.1",
  "bin": {
    "snapback": "dist/index.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@inquirer/prompts": "catalog:",
    "@snapback/contracts": "workspace:*",
    "@snapback/core": "workspace:*",
    "chalk": "catalog:",
    "commander": "catalog:",
    "esprima": "catalog:",
    "ora": "catalog:"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "catalog:",
    "tsup": "catalog:",
    "tsx": "catalog:",
    "typescript": "catalog:",
    "vitest": "catalog:"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup",
    "check": "biome check .",
    "dev": "tsup --watch",
    "format": "biome format --write .",
    "lint": "biome lint .",
    "lint:fix": "biome lint --fix .",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit"
  },
  "type": "module"
}
